Vactra Flow — Terms & Privacy
Vactra Flow mein aapka swagat hai! 🎬
Shuru karne se pehle, kripya hamare terms padhen

📋 Service ki Shartein

Vactra Flow use karke aap hamari service ki shartein maante hain. Aap apni asli identity use karenge aur doosron ko nuqsan pahunchane wala content upload nahi karenge.

🔒 Privacy Policy

Hum aapka data surakshit rakhte hain. Aapki personal jaankari kabhi bhi third party ko nahi bechte. Aapka data sirf Vactra Flow service improve karne ke liye use hoga.

📸 Content Policy

Aap sirf wo content upload kar sakte hain jo aapka apna ho ya jiske liye aapke paas permission ho. Hate speech, violence, ya adult content bilkul allow nahi hai.

🍪 Cookies

Hum cookies use karte hain taaki aapka experience behtar ho. Isme login session, preferences, aur recommendations shamil hain.

🔔 Notifications

Hum aapko new videos, comments, aur updates ke baare mein notify karenge. Aap notifications kabhi bhi settings mein band kar sakte hain.

🎬

Duniya ka sabse badhiya video aur photo sharing platform. Apni kahani duniya ke saath share karein.

Miss Na Karein
Apne favorite creators ko subscribe karein aur naye videos ki instant notification paayein!
⭐
Star Ban
Jaiye Aap!
Apna channel banayein, videos upload karein aur Vactra Flow pe apni pehchaan banayein. Shuruat abhi karein!
